/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/test_main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/test_tensor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/test_graph.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/test_result.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/test_core.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/test_model.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/test_project_memory.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/test_integration.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/home/runner/work/ofxGgml/ofxGgml/src/ofxGgmlCore.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/home/runner/work/ofxGgml/ofxGgml/src/ofxGgmlGraph.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/home/runner/work/ofxGgml/ofxGgml/src/ofxGgmlTensor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/home/runner/work/ofxGgml/ofxGgml/src/ofxGgmlModel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ofxGgml-tests.dir/home/runner/work/ofxGgml/ofxGgml/src/ofxGgmlProjectMemory.cpp.o" -o ofxGgml-tests  /home/runner/work/ofxGgml/ofxGgml/tests/../libs/ggml/build/src/libggml.a /home/runner/work/ofxGgml/ofxGgml/tests/../libs/ggml/build/src/libggml-base.a /home/runner/work/ofxGgml/ofxGgml/tests/../libs/ggml/build/src/libggml-cpu.a -lpthread -ldl
